title: Verify existing implementation of JWT auth migration
description: The JWT auth system migration is partially implemented. Core components exist: JwtService with access/refresh token rotation, AuthService with PBKDF2 password verification, Users collection with RBAC fields (admin/editor/viewer), and withAuth HOC. However, login.ts still uses the deprecated UserStore/SessionStore pattern instead of AuthService. Migration script is missing. This task verifies the partial implementation status.
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.ts - AuthService with login/refresh/logout using Payload DB
src/auth/withAuth.ts - withAuth HOC using AuthService for route protection
src/collections/Users.ts - Payload collection with role, refreshToken, tokenExpiresAt fields
